title: Chelqath #2520
definition:
Helkath = "smooth"

 1) the town named as the starting point for the boundary of the tribe
    of Asher and allotted with its suburbs to the Gershonite Levites
nasbUsage:
Definition: Helkath = "smooth"

 1) the town named as the starting point for the boundary of the tribe
    of Asher and allotted with its suburbs to the Gershonite Levites

    NASB:  portion, possession, a city in Asher
